creator: anarcat+register@orangeseeds.org
text:
The bsdinstall installer fails to fetch the packages from the network because of DNS problems.

resolv.conf is a symlink to /tmp/bsdinstall../resolv.conf, which is missing.

I tried starting dhclient by hand in a shell, no luck, the file gets removed again.

Fix: 

Use the disc1 image instead.
How-To-Repeat: 
Boot over NFS using this technique:

https://wiki.koumbit.net/FreeBsd/PxeBootConfiguration#NFS_server
